dsp_disclaimer: DSP usage percentages are based on the Helix firmware 3.80 specification. Actual values may vary based on model complexity and effect parameters. Mono and stereo modes have different DSP loads.

blocks.name: 12-String
blocks.description: This is the 12-String effect block for the HX Stomp.

parameters.name: Blend
parameters.description: Mixes the effect with the original signal.

parameters.name: Bass
parameters.description: Adjusts the low-frequency content of the signal.

parameters.name: Treble
parameters.description: Adjusts the high-frequency content of the signal.

parameters.name: Level
parameters.description: Sets the overall output level of the block.
